Internal function to merge values of duplicated keys

Source: R/dictionaries.R
merge_dictionary_values.Rd

Internal function to merge values of duplicated keys

Usage

merge_dictionary_values(dict)

Arguments

dict

a dictionary object

Examples

dict <- list("A" = list(AA = list("aaaaa"), "a"),
             "B" = list("b"),
             "C" = list("c"),
             "A" = list("aa"))
quanteda:::merge_dictionary_values(dict)
#> $A
#> $A$AA
#> $A$AA[[1]]
#> [1] "aaaaa"
#> 
#> 
#> $A[[2]]
#> [1] "a"  "aa"
#> 
#> 
#> $B
#> $B[[1]]
#> [1] "b"
#> 
#> 
#> $C
#> $C[[1]]
#> [1] "c"
#> 
#>

On this page
